---
pagetitle: "Word Explainer for Wonder-Driven Computer People"
page-layout: full
lightbox: auto
comments: false
format:
  html:
    fig-responsive: true
---

```{=html}
<style>
h2 {
  border-bottom: none !important;
}
</style>
```

:::: {layout="[ 45, 55 ]"}

::: {#first-column}

![](assets/logos/logo-color-transparent.svg){.nolightbox fig-alt="Word Explainer for Wonder-Driven Computer People" width=100% height=auto}

:::

::: {#second-column}

## Headline

why is this going above

Explain what this is

{{< lipsum 2 >}}

[obligatory xkcd](https://xkcd.com/1133/)
:::

::::
